subject: [SDNC] Provide proxy settings for sdnr mountpointRegistrar
commit_message:
[SDNC] Provide proxy settings for sdnr mountpointRegistrar

proxyUser, ProxyPassowrd and proxyUrl for jersey.config.client.proxy settings

Issue-ID: OOM-2662
Signed-off-by: demskeq8 <alexander.dehn@highstreet-technologies.com>
Change-Id: I9136e71153ccce88b8bc8a6501ebdea2eb3a93cb

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/209/ : FAILURE

The line in commit is too long: it has a size of 81 instead of 80 characters maximum.

Line in cause: add proxyUser, ProxyPassowrd and proxyUrl for jersey.config.client.proxy settings ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/209/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/209/ )
